# Voice Guide

## Configured Traits

- concrete
- warm
- strategic
- low-fluff

## Observed Style Signals

- prefers concise sentence structure
- leans into first-person ownership language
- uses restrained emphasis

## Recommendations

- Keep sentence length compact and direct.
- Introduce more quantified proof points when possible.
- Maintain the low-hedge, confident tone.
- First-person ownership is part of the voice; keep it purposeful, not repetitive.

## Watchouts

- Sample set is short, so style signals may be noisy.

## Top Repeated Terms

- work (4)
- about (3)
- more (3)
- team (3)
- can (2)
- my (2)
- visible (2)
- what (2)
- where (2)
- actually (1)

## Repeated Phrases

- about showing (1)
- about sounding (1)
- about what (1)
- actually experience (1)
- become obvious (1)
- best alex (1)
- bias make (1)
- bottlenecks visible (1)

## Opening Sentence Patterns

- I’m drawn to roles where strategy and operations have to stay honest about what customers actually experience
- The team does not need more status reporting

## Quant Signals

- Average sentence length: 14.7
- Average paragraph length: 19
- Lexical diversity: 0.76
- Evidence markers: 0
- Action verb count: 0
- Hedge count: 0

## Sample Coverage

- writing/cover-letter-fintech.md: 77 words, 15.4 avg words/sentence
- writing/ops-memo.md: 56 words, 14 avg words/sentence
